support.title: Support Center

support.eyebrow: Help for accounts, gameplay and fair play

quickHelp.title: Quick help paths
quickHelp.subtitle: Choose the closest topic so your report reaches the right place faster.
quickHelp.accountBody: Use this for login issues, verification trouble, profile problems, or missing progress.
quickHelp.gameplayBody: Report stuck games, invite problems, time-control confusion, or a board that behaves incorrectly.
quickHelp.fairPlayBody: Contact support about abusive behavior, cheating concerns, tournament disputes, or policy violations.

support.policyHint: Review the fair-play and platform rules.
support.contactSubtitle: Send a clear message and include the game ID, invite code, or tournament name when relevant.

contactMethods.title: Other ways to reach us

contactMethods.policyHint: Review the fair-play and platform rules before submitting a report.

form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what happened, what page you were on, and what you expected to happen.
form.privacyNote: Do not include passwords, one-time codes, or private payment details in your message.
form.error: Failed to send message. Please try again.

faqs.a1: TzDraft follows standard 8x8 Draughts rules. Pieces move forward diagonally. Pieces are removed when captured. Capture is mandatory.
faqs.q2: Can I play against my friends?
faqs.a2: Yes! Click 'Play with Friend', create an online invite, then share the invite link or code with your friend.
faqs.q3: I found a bug, how do I report it?
faqs.a3: Please use the form below to describe the issue. Include the Game ID if applicable.
faqs.q4: What should I include in a support request?
faqs.a4: Include your username, the feature you were using, the time of the issue, and any game ID, invite code, or tournament name connected to the problem.

featured.description: Can you find the winning sequence in this position? Test your skills and climb the tactical leaderboard.

seo.description: Master winning tactics with real Tanzania Drafti puzzles. Sharpen your game and train with daily challenges.

hint.correct: Correct — keep practicing for faster solves.

guestCta.title: Save your tactical progress!
guestCta.desc: Register to track your puzzle rating and streak.

hints.sacrifice: Consider giving up material to gain a decisive positional advantage.
hints.positionTrap: A quiet move sets up an unstoppable threat. Think two moves ahead.
hints.kingTrap: The opponent's king is vulnerable. Find the move that traps or eliminates it.
hints.endgame: Precise king maneuvers decide this endgame. Every tempo counts.
hints.promotion: A man is one step from becoming a king. Clear the path.
hints.tactical: Look for the move that creates the biggest long-term advantage.
